ogTitle: Greenwich Park vs Greg Greg: Climate Safety

heading: Greenwich Park vs Greg Greg — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Greenwich Park, New South Wales and Greg Greg, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Greg Greg has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Greenwich Park (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Greenwich Park or Greg Greg safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Greenwich Park has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Greg Greg scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Greenwich Park scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Greg Greg scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Greenwich Park or Greg Greg?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Greg Greg has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
